solutions.solution: (c) Spoon, glass and brinjal are entirely different from one another. This can be expressed as given in option (c).
(e) All pens belong to the group of stationery but powder is entirely different from both of them. This can be expressed as given in option (e).
(d) Car and jeep are entirely different but they both completely belong to the group of vehicles. This can be expressed as given in option (d).
(a) Year contains month and month contains days. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
(a) 'Milk' and 'River water' both are liquids. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
(d) Snake and lizard are entirely different but both belong to the class of reptiles. This can be expressed as given in option (d).
(d) Tigers are animals but not herbivorous. This can be expressed as given in option (d).
(c) Some lawyers may be smokers while some lawyers may be non-smokers. But all the smokers and non-smokers may not be lawyers. This can be expressed as given in option (c).
(b) Sea is a part of the Earth but Sun is present outside the Earth. This relation can be expressed as given in option (b).
(d) All the teachers are educated but some are employed. This can be expressed as given in option (d).
(a) Thief is a criminal but police is different. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
(b) Rupee and dollar are entirely different from each other but both come under the category of currency. This can be expressed as given in option (b).
(a) Wolves and elephants both are animals but are different from each other. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
(a) Some women are poets. Some women are politicians. Some women politicians are poets. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
